name: C-15 --skip-fresh records an audit jsonl entry per the operator-bypass contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --framework-id soc2-tsc --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --skip-fresh --emit-audit audit.jsonl && [ -s audit.jsonl ] && grep -q '"action":"skip-fresh"' audit.jsonl && grep -q 'soc2-tsc' audit.jsonl && echo bypassed 1>&2
